scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm -w @rta/telemetry run build && npm -w @rta/core run build && npm -w @rta/rag run build && npm -w @rta/llm run build
scripts.build:apps: npm -w @rta/api run build && npm -w @rta/web run build
